title: gelseminum alatum
intro: Gelseminum alatum, also known as Yellow Stag's Horn, is a perennial flowering plant native to Asia, belonging to the family Loganiaceae. Its medicinal properties lie in its unique alkaloids, including gelsemine, which exhibit potent neurotoxic effects, making it useful in traditional medicine for treating various ailments. The health benefits of Gelseminum alatum include its potential to alleviate pain, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, although caution is advised due to its toxicity and potential side effects.
